topics.title: Andrew Dice Clay Interview Feedback
topics.summary: The studio reviews listener feedback regarding the recent interview with Andrew Dice Clay, weighing high praise for his performance against criticism of his behavior toward the hosts.

topics.title: A-List Status and Production Disputes
topics.summary: The studio explores the requirements for A-list celebrity status through scandal, discusses a listener's film festival entry, and addresses internal production conflicts regarding a segment about car heaters.

topics.title: Film Festival and Television Prize Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming film festival details, production progress for various projects, and a potential high-value television prize involving provocative conditions.

topics.title: Contestants Compete for Television Prize
topics.summary: The studio hosts and guests debate the terms of a competition involving physical acts to win a television set.

topics.title: Sports Commentary and Pop Culture Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on college basketball upsets, the career paths of former athletes, and various pop culture references including television shows and comic book trivia.

topics.title: Seth Green and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio introduces Seth Green and a guest named Mark the Bagger before transitioning into an evaluation segment with stylist Ralph Cirilla.

topics.title: Playboy Modeling Evaluation
topics.summary: The studio evaluates a woman's potential for appearing in Playboy while discussing her background as a student and bartender.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a report on the growth of satellite radio, reports of an incident involving a television broadcast, and various news stories including celebrity rumors and legal cases.

topics.title: Deal or No Deal Production Insights
topics.summary: The studio explores the production of "Deal or No Deal," including the host's decision-making process, the challenges of maintaining tension on network television, and the physical toll of the show's format on contestants.

topics.title: Deal or No Deal and Halle Berry Incident
topics.summary: The studio explores the mechanics of the game show Deal or No Deal, the host's experience with a tense interaction involving actress Halle Berry, and personal anecdotes regarding public image.

topics.title: Mark the Bagger and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including an interview with Mark the Bagger, discussions regarding personal habits and relationships, and a caller seeking jewelry pricing for an engagement.

topics.title: Radio Show Comedy Bits and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of comedic segments involving guest interactions, discussions about the benefits of satellite radio, and a recurring joke regarding Mike Walker's flatulence.

topics.title: Stuttering John and Jay Leno
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent article about Stuttering John's career, his tenure on The Tonight Show, and the professional relationship between him and Jay Leno.

topics.title: Conflict with Jay Leno and Divorce News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout from a former employee's departure, allegations of stolen material by Jay Leno, and the legal details surrounding Richie Sambora and Heather Locklear's divorce.

topics.title: Kidnapping Case and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses a kidnapping case involving a girl held for ten years, legislative changes regarding sex offenders in South Carolina, Charlie Sheen’s 9/11 conspiracy claims, and various entertainment news items.
